title: Stainless Steel Spatula, 35cm Stainless Steel Fish Slice Spatula Turner Length for Frying Steak Fish Eggs Pie Kitchen Utensil
features: [Stylish Design]—This wok spatula features a sleek brushed stainless steel finish, combining modern aesthetics with sturdy construction for easy use and comfort.
[High-Quality Material]—Crafted from 304 premium stainless steel, it is anti-rust, reusable, and durable, ensuring it won’t dent, crack, or chip.
[Ergonomic Handle]—The handle minimizes heat transfer and offers a secure, comfortable grip; the loop allows for easy hanging storage.
[Easy to Clean]—Simply rinse under water or place in the dishwasher for hassle-free cleaning and maintenance.
[Satisfaction Guaranteed]—Enjoy peace of mind with our 100% money-back or replacement guarantee; contact us with any questions for a prompt response within 12 hours.
description: Slotted Turner Metal Spatula, Heavy Duty 304 Stainless Steel Slotted Spatula for Cooking, Fish Spatula, Kitchen Cooking Utensil Specification: Material: Stainless steel Size: 34.5*7.8cm Weight: 126g * Idea for cooking fish, filets, seafood cakes, egg, dumplings, meat and more *Easy for turning the finish, meet, dumpling or eggs, easy to filter the oil out *Easy to Hang up for store *Great for everyday use Experience the ultimate in cooking convenience with our Premium Brushed Stainless Steel Slotted Wok Spatula. Designed with a stylish and sturdy build, this spatula features a sleek finish and an ergonomic hollow handle that minimizes heat transfer for safe handling. Made from high-quality 304 stainless steel, it resists rust and damage, ensuring long-lasting performance. Cleanup is effortless, whether by hand or in the dishwasher. With our satisfaction guarantee, you can trust that your purchase is protected. Perfect for all your cooking needs, this spatula is a must-have for any kitchen!
